description: Recto (secondary use): Short letter from a teacher to a father. In Judaeo-Arabic. "This is to inform you my lord, the elder, may God make your honored position permanent, that Abū l-Ḥasan, after his transfer to my school, showed great zeal for study. His great misfortune was that Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wuhayb broke his board with the knowledge of the other boys. And peace." (Goitein's translation.)
description_he: פתק קצר ממורה לאב ביהודית-ערבית: אבו אל-חסן מגלה מרץ בלימודים, אולם אבו אל-חסן בן ווהייב שבר את לוחו בנוכחות הילדים האחרים.
